global_description: A small songbird with a compact, rounded body. It features a distinctive bay-colored breast and flanks, contrasting with a black face and crown. The wings and back are streaked with olive and black, while the underparts are lighter. The bird has a short, pointed beak.

part_details.face: Black with a sharp contrast to the surrounding colors
part_details.wings: Olive and black streaked, elongated shape

spatial_relations: The black crown merges into the black face
The bay-colored breast transitions into lighter underparts
The streaked wings extend from the sides of the body
